creator: duncan@bayne.id.au
text:
* Overview

Installing the mail/mu port, either from source or as a package, does not install mu4e.

* Steps to Reproduce

1. cd /usr/ports/mail/mu && sudo make && sudo make install

.. or ..

1. sudo pkg install -y mu

then:

2. emacs
3. M-x ielm
4. (require 'mu4e)

* Actual Results

 *** Eval error ***  Cannot open load file: no such file or directory, mu4e

* Expected Results

 ELISP> (require 'mu4e)
 mu4e
